_comment: Deployment constants for the GIP-151 redemption pipeline. Edit this file to move from the preview fork to production — the scripts read it, nothing is hardcoded. RPC URLs are NOT here: they live in .env (the Tenderly fork URL is a credential). See config.ts for the validation rules.
_depositContract: Deployed RedemptionDeposit. gno/osgno/safe/osgnoRate/deadline are read FROM it — never restated here, so they cannot drift from chain.
_deployBlock: Block the deposit contract was deployed at — where the Deposited event scan starts. Too high silently drops early deposits (the totalDeposited reconciliation catches it and aborts).
_logStep: getLogs range per request. Public Gnosis RPCs allow 10000; Tenderly virtual RPCs reject anything above ~1000. Override with LOG_STEP env.
_payoutTokens: THE ASSETS TO DISTRIBUTE. The Safe is funded with exactly the amounts to hand out, so each token's FULL Safe balance becomes its basket leg, split pro-rata by deposit stake. A token the Safe holds that is NOT listed here is distributed to NOBODY — it stays in the Safe and depositors are under-paid. Addresses are verified on-chain at runtime (symbol + decimals must match) so a wrong address throws instead of silently contributing a zero balance. GNO/osGNO must never be listed: the Safe holds them because deposits are forwarded to it, so they ARE the deposits, not the proceeds.
